goal: Design an interaction optimization plan that consolidates profile, community, settings, and related quick-entry modules into a single right-side trigger button with hover-to-expand behavior, improving visual clarity of the main menu.
constraints: Design-first output only in this round; do not implement business code changes.
Keep existing navigation model and modal opening logic semantics unchanged at plan level.
Preserve all currently available menu functions; no functional regression is allowed in the proposed design.
Include desktop hover interaction details and non-hover fallback behavior for touch devices.
If plan assumptions are uncertain, mark UNKNOWN and list them in open_questions.md.
deliverables: Current-state module inventory for right-side consolidation scope.
Interaction design spec: states, trigger zones, timing, collapse rules, and conflict handling.
Information architecture proposal for panel item grouping and ordering.
Implementation-ready acceptance checklist for later coding phase.
